title: Comprehensive Audit Framework Across 19 Domains

domains.name: Third-Party Management and Sub-contractors
key_controls: Maintain a comprehensive third-party inventory with risk classification for all vendors, subcontractors, and fourth parties
Conduct inherent risk assessments before engaging any subcontractor or outsourced service provider
Require Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure Agreements from all outsourced relationships
Perform annual risk and security assessments on critical outsourced functions
Define policies and procedures for management, notification, and approval of additional/down-chain outsourcing arrangements
Establish periodic vendor reassessment processes for material changes to risk posture or service offerings
Implement comprehensive vendor lifecycle management covering onboarding, periodic evaluation, and systematic offboarding

audit_questions.text: Is there a complete, up-to-date inventory of all third-party vendors and subcontractors?
Are risk and security assessments conducted before engaging subcontractors?
Are NDAs and confidentiality agreements in place for all outsourced relationships?
Is there a defined policy for approving and managing additional outsourcing layers?
Are critical vendors subject to annual reassessment?

domains.name: Governance and Risk Management
key_controls: Maintain a board-approved Enterprise Risk Management (ERM) framework covering people, processes, data, and technology
Assign a governing body and designated management executive accountable for maintaining the risk governance plan
Define and communicate organizational risk appetite and approach with clear employee guidelines
Implement risk metrics systematically measuring and reporting operational effectiveness of controls
Establish a formal risk register tracking original and residual risks with tolerance validation
Define risk scenarios addressing threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts affecting all assets
Conduct periodic independent reviews for oversight and governance of program effectiveness

audit_questions.text: Is a formal ERM framework documented and approved by senior management/board?
Is there a designated risk owner at executive/board level?
Is the organizational risk appetite formally defined and communicated?
Are risk registers maintained and regularly updated?
Are periodic independent reviews conducted on the risk governance program?

domains.name: Information Protection
key_controls: Implement a comprehensive information security policy with formal management approval and verified stakeholder communication
Establish data classification and handling requirements with data minimization principles, retention policies, and disposal procedures
Apply security policies for protection requirements on information processed on external systems
Conduct formal policy review and update processes triggered when significant operating changes occur
Implement monitoring and logging for information security events with defined escalation protocols
Enforce access controls based on least-privilege and need-to-know principles for all information assets
Define data protection impact assessment processes for third parties handling personal data

audit_questions.text: Is a formal, management-approved information security policy in place and communicated?
Are data classification levels defined and applied across all information assets?
Are data minimization and retention policies enforced?
Are DPIAs conducted for third-party data processing arrangements?
Are access controls reviewed regularly based on least-privilege principles?

domains.name: IT Operations and Business Resilience
key_controls: Develop and maintain comprehensive Business Continuity Plans (BCP) and Disaster Recovery Plans (DRP) for all critical banking systems
Define Recovery Time Objectives (RTO) and Recovery Point Objectives (RPO) for critical systems and services
Conduct regular BCP/DRP testing with documented outcomes, gap analysis, and improvement plans
Establish 24x7 incident response procedures with defined escalation matrices and response team contacts
Implement IT vulnerability management with systematic tracking of remediation timelines and effectiveness
Ensure technology infrastructure redundancy and capacity planning for banking operations
Maintain comprehensive IT operations documentation including change management procedures

audit_questions.text: Are BCP and DRP documented, approved, and tested at least annually?
evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

audit_questions.text: Are RTO and RPO defined and validated through testing?
evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

audit_questions.text: Is there a documented incident response procedure with defined escalation paths?
Are vulnerability management processes in place with tracked remediation timelines?
Are change management procedures documented and enforced?

relevant_evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

domains.name: Financial Risk Management
key_controls: Maintain audited financial statements, cash flow projections, and demonstrate continuous profitability over three years
Ensure adequate insurance coverage including professional indemnity, cyber liability, and errors and omissions
Implement controls preventing excessive debt-to-equity ratios or financial leverage compromising service delivery
Establish financial performance benchmarking with early warning indicators for declining financial health
Conduct regular stress testing scenarios for financial resilience under adverse economic conditions
Maintain detailed contingency funding plans and alternative financing sources for service continuity
Establish procedures for managing foreign exchange, interest rate risk, and currency hedging

audit_questions.text: Are audited financial statements and cash flow projections available for the past 3 years?
Is adequate insurance coverage (professional indemnity, cyber liability) maintained?
Are financial stress tests conducted and documented?
Are early warning indicators for financial deterioration defined and monitored?
Are contingency funding plans in place for adverse market conditions?
evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

domains.name: Legal and Compliance Risk
key_controls: Implement systematic regulatory change management processes ensuring third-party relationships remain compliant with evolving requirements
Maintain legally binding written contracts clearly defining legal relationships and enforceable service levels
Include comprehensive indemnification and liability allocation provisions in all contracts
Establish controls ensuring compliance with RBI IT outsourcing directions including prior approval for arrangements
Verify that IT service providers comply with banking regulations, data localization requirements, and licensing
Define clear liability frameworks addressing default events, resolution processes, and data breach remedies
Ensure contracts include termination rights for legal breaches, fraud, or data leakage

audit_questions.text: Are all IT outsourcing arrangements compliant with RBI directions and prior approval obtained?
Do contracts include comprehensive indemnification and liability clauses?
Are regulatory change management processes in place to track evolving requirements?
Do contracts provide for immediate termination in cases of legal breach or fraud?
Are data localization requirements and licensing verifications documented?

domains.name: Human Resources Security
key_controls: Conduct comprehensive background verification for all personnel handling banking data, including criminal checks
Implement mandatory information security awareness training and periodic refresher training for all personnel
Ensure personnel sign comprehensive confidentiality agreements, acceptable use policies, and security responsibilities
Enforce role-based access principles with regular privilege reviews and segregation of duties controls
Establish immediate access revocation, asset return, and exit procedures upon employment termination
Implement user behavior analytics and monitoring for detecting and responding to insider threats
Subject contractors and temporary staff to the same background checks, training, and access controls as permanent employees

audit_questions.text: Are background checks conducted for all personnel handling sensitive banking data?
Is mandatory security awareness training completed and documented for all staff?
Are confidentiality agreements signed by all employees and contractors?
Are access privileges reviewed regularly and revoked immediately upon termination?
Are insider threat monitoring mechanisms in place?

domains.name: DPDP Domain
key_controls: Appoint a designated Data Protection Officer (DPO) with clearly defined roles and responsibilities
Maintain a complete inventory of personal data processing activities including data flows, purposes, legal bases, and retention periods
Implement documented procedures for handling data principal requests (access, correction, erasure, and grievance redressal)
Enforce technical and organizational security measures including encryption, access controls, and monitoring for personal data
Establish incident response procedures and breach notification templates aligned with DPDP Act requirements
Conduct Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs) for all high-risk processing activities
Implement automated and manual data erasure procedures with audit logs and deletion confirmation

audit_questions.text: Is a DPO formally appointed with documented roles and responsibilities?
Is a data processing inventory maintained with purposes, legal bases, and retention periods?
Are procedures in place for handling data principal access, correction, and erasure requests?
Are DPIAs conducted for high-risk personal data processing activities?
Are breach notification procedures compliant with DPDP Act timelines?

domains.name: Organizational Security Governance
key_controls: Maintain a comprehensive ISMS documentation set including policy framework, process maps, control implementations, and governance structure
Establish a documented governance framework with committee charters, role definitions, reporting structures, and decision-making authorities
Develop a comprehensive risk management framework specific to ISMS covering identification, assessment, treatment, and monitoring
Define KPIs and metrics for monitoring ISMS effectiveness including security metrics, compliance measures, and business alignment
Implement a comprehensive documentation control system with version control, access controls, retention policies, and audit trails
Maintain a comprehensive scope statement defining geographical, organizational, and technical boundaries of the ISMS
Establish a continuous monitoring and improvement process including regular assessments and corrective/preventive measures

audit_questions.text: Is the ISMS scope formally documented with justified exclusions?
Is there a governance framework with defined roles, authorities, and reporting structures?
Are ISMS KPIs and metrics defined, measured, and reported regularly?
Is documentation control (version control, access, retention) implemented for all ISMS documents?
Is there evidence of continuous improvement processes with corrective/preventive actions?

domains.name: Physical and Environmental Security
key_controls: Define and document physical security perimeters with access control zones, barrier specifications, and perimeter monitoring
Implement documented physical access control systems (card readers, biometric devices, visitor management) with comprehensive logging
Conduct comprehensive security assessments of all facilities with risk ratings and specific protection measures for each zone
Establish environmental protection systems (HVAC, fire detection/suppression, water leak detection, temperature/humidity monitoring)
Enforce clean desk and screen lock policies with regular audits, compliance metrics, and corrective actions
Develop and maintain emergency response procedures including evacuation plans and coordination with emergency services
Implement secure equipment disposal procedures with data wiping, physical destruction, and disposal certification

audit_questions.text: Are physical security perimeters and access zones clearly defined and documented?
Are access logs (employee/visitor entry/exit) maintained and regularly reviewed?
Are environmental controls (HVAC, fire suppression) tested and documented?
Is a clean desk policy enforced and compliance audited regularly?
Are equipment disposal procedures ensuring secure data destruction in place?

domains.name: Due Diligence and Vendor Assessment
key_controls: Establish a defined risk assessment and classification method for all vendors with standardized criteria and evaluation frameworks
Conduct technology infrastructure assessments including security certifications, redundancy plans, and scalability analysis
Perform comprehensive reputational reviews including legal clearance, regulatory investigation disclosures, and media monitoring
Require independent third-party technology architecture reviews and penetration testing results for critical vendors
Document technical expertise, certifications, and past project deliveries for financial institutions
Establish minimum security requirement criteria, financial stability thresholds, and operational capability standards
Conduct regular country risk assessments for all operational jurisdictions of vendors

audit_questions.text: Is a standardized vendor risk assessment and classification method documented and applied?
Are reputational and legal clearance checks conducted for all vendors?
Are independent security assessments (pen testing, architecture reviews) required for critical vendors?
Are minimum security and financial stability thresholds defined and verified?
Are country risk assessments conducted for vendors with international operations?

domains.name: Monitoring and Control
key_controls: Implement a comprehensive KRI framework with leading and lagging indicators, automated alerting, and escalation matrices
Deploy continuous service level monitoring platforms with automated threshold-based alerting and SLA breach notifications
Maintain real-time performance monitoring systems with service availability dashboards and response time analytics
Establish structured communication protocols for material issues, service disruption notifications, and regulatory reporting
Implement continuous cloud infrastructure monitoring (where applicable) with SIEM integration and real-time threat detection
Define escalation matrices with trigger points, notification procedures, and board reporting protocols
Conduct periodic independent reviews for oversight and governance of monitoring program effectiveness

audit_questions.text: Is a KRI framework with defined thresholds and automated alerts in place?
Are SLA performance metrics monitored continuously with breach notification procedures?
Are escalation matrices documented with clear trigger points and stakeholder contacts?
Is SIEM or equivalent continuous monitoring deployed for security events?
Are periodic independent reviews of monitoring effectiveness conducted?

domains.name: Cloud Computing and Infrastructure
key_controls: Verify cloud service provider compliance with RBI-approved jurisdictions and data localization/residency requirements
Implement technical access controls for tenant isolation with contractual provisions preventing unauthorized access
Deploy comprehensive cloud security architecture including encryption, network segmentation, and threat detection capabilities
Implement role-based access control with multi-factor authentication, identity management, and privileged access management
Deploy continuous cloud infrastructure monitoring with automated incident response and forensic readiness
Conduct regular access reviews and privilege certification processes for all cloud banking system users
Establish container-based security controls, micro-segmentation, and runtime protection for banking workloads

audit_questions.text: Are cloud service providers compliant with RBI data localization and jurisdiction requirements?
Are tenant isolation and multi-tenant data segregation controls implemented and validated?
Is MFA enforced for all cloud banking system access?
Are privileged access management systems in place with regular access reviews?
Is continuous cloud security monitoring with automated incident response deployed?

domains.name: Exit Strategy and Termination
key_controls: Develop comprehensive exit strategy documentation with termination procedures, senior management approval, and responsibility matrices
Document secure data transfer procedures including banking data migration protocols and security validation
Maintain pre-qualified alternative service provider portfolios with regular validation testing of alternative arrangements
Define business continuity plans during exit transitions minimizing banking operation disruption
Establish contractual cooperation obligations during transitions including personnel access, documentation handover, and system access agreements
Conduct comprehensive transition support with knowledge transfer procedures and technical assistance agreements
Define contractual provisions for data portability and vendor lock-in prevention

audit_questions.text: Is a comprehensive exit strategy documented and approved by senior management?
Are secure data transfer and return procedures defined in contracts?
Are pre-qualified alternative service providers identified and regularly tested?
Do contracts include data portability and vendor lock-in prevention clauses?
Are knowledge transfer and transition support obligations contractually defined?

relevant_evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

domains.name: Cross-Border and Regulatory Compliance
key_controls: Ensure banking data residency within India with technical controls preventing unauthorized cross-border transfers
Implement contract clauses specifying Indian law governance, exclusive Indian court jurisdiction, and dispute resolution mechanisms
Develop a dual regulatory compliance framework covering Indian and foreign regulation adherence with conflict resolution mechanisms
Conduct comprehensive country risk assessments for all operational jurisdictions covering political, economic, and legal risks
Implement data loss prevention (DLP) systems and jurisdiction boundary monitoring for cross-border transfer prevention
Maintain regulatory conflict monitoring processes and Indian compliance prioritization frameworks
Verify contractual enforceability under the Indian legal framework with legal opinion documentation

audit_questions.text: Are controls in place ensuring banking data remains within India?
Do contracts specify Indian law governance and Indian court jurisdiction?
Is a dual regulatory compliance framework in place for multi-jurisdictional operations?
Are comprehensive country risk assessments conducted and updated regularly?
Are DLP systems deployed to prevent unauthorized cross-border data transfers?

domains.name: Governance and Organizational Structure
key_controls: Establish board-approved IT outsourcing policies defining risk appetite, governance frameworks, and material outsourcing criteria
Designate a senior IT function with clearly defined roles, oversight procedures, and a central vendor database
Implement robust conflict of interest controls with director/key personnel declarations and ownership interest verification
Establish a comprehensive grievance redressal mechanism for customer complaints related to outsourced IT services
Define board reporting processes including regular performance metrics, risk assessments, and material change notifications
Document IT function authority, resource allocation, and vendor performance monitoring capabilities
Maintain organizational chart showing dedicated TPRM team with clearly defined roles, responsibilities, and reporting structures

audit_questions.text: Are board-approved IT outsourcing policies with defined risk appetite documented?
Is a senior IT function formally designated with documented authority and responsibilities?
Are conflict of interest declarations and ownership verification processes in place?
Is a grievance redressal mechanism established for outsourced IT service complaints?
Are regular board reports on IT outsourcing arrangements maintained and reviewed?

domains.name: Information Security and Data Protection
key_controls: Implement a comprehensive ISMS with formal management approval covering all information security domains
Apply encryption, access controls, and monitoring systems as technical and organizational security measures
Establish privacy by design documentation with proactive privacy measures in system design
Define security policies establishing protection requirements for information processed on external systems
Implement comprehensive Key Risk Indicator (KRI) framework for information security risk monitoring
Enforce data breach notification procedures aligned with applicable regulatory timelines
Conduct mandatory information security awareness training and competency assessments for all personnel

audit_questions.text: Is a comprehensive ISMS implemented with formal management approval?
Are encryption and access controls applied to all sensitive information assets?
Are privacy-by-design principles embedded in system development processes?
Are breach notification procedures aligned with regulatory timelines?
Is mandatory security awareness training conducted and completion tracked?

domains.name: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery
key_controls: Develop comprehensive BCP and DRP covering critical banking systems with defined RTO and RPO
Conduct annual BCP/DRP testing with banking client participation, recovery capability validation, and improvement plans
Maintain a comprehensive risk assessment of critical business processes with business impact analysis
Define disaster recovery plans for natural disasters, fire, flood, power outages, and cyber incidents
Establish regular testing documentation with results analysis, plan updates, and business requirement integration
Implement alternative site arrangements and insourcing capability development plans
Align SLA performance metrics with business criticality and recovery capability requirements

audit_questions.text: Are BCP and DRP documented for all critical banking systems with defined RTO/RPO?
evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

audit_questions.text: Are annual BCP/DRP tests conducted with documented outcomes and improvement plans?
evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

audit_questions.text: Is a business impact analysis (BIA) completed identifying critical processes?
evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

audit_questions.text: Are disaster scenarios (natural, cyber, power) covered in recovery plans?
evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

audit_questions.text: Are alternative site or insourcing arrangements validated and tested regularly?
evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

relevant_evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan

domains.name: Contractual and Legal Compliance
key_controls: Ensure all contracts include comprehensive data protection, cybersecurity, and regulatory compliance requirements
Include mandatory breach notification requirements with timelines, stakeholder communication, and remediation frameworks
Define SLA provisions with performance metrics, availability requirements, and penalty provisions in all contracts
Implement controls ensuring all IT services contracts include provisions for RBI supervisory access and regulatory inspections
Establish clear ownership of information, trade secrets, and intellectual property with definitions and protection clauses
Include contract provisions for access, audit, and information rights enabling oversight and compliance verification
Ensure contractual obligations flow down to all organizational entities including subcontractors and fourth parties

audit_questions.text: Do all contracts include comprehensive data protection and cybersecurity requirements?
Are mandatory breach notification timelines and remediation frameworks included in contracts?
Do contracts include provisions for RBI supervisory access and regulatory inspections?
Are IP ownership and confidentiality clauses defined in all agreements?
Are flow-down compliance obligations included for subcontractors and fourth parties?

evidence_types: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan
